name: SplitButton

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Save" OnClick="HandleSave">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="HandleSaveAndPublish">Save and Publish</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="HandleSaveAsDraft">Save as Draft</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem>Discard changes</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

@code {
    private void HandleSave() { /* primary action */ }
    private void HandleSaveAndPublish() { /* secondary */ }
    private void HandleSaveAsDraft() { /* secondary */ }
}

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Secondary" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Outline" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<SplitButton Text="Small" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>
<SplitButton Text="Large" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg">
    <MenuContent><DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem></MenuContent>
</SplitButton>

mdSummary:
# SplitButton

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/split-button

## Parameters

|---|---|---|---|---|
| SplitButton | Text | `string?` | `` |  |
| SplitButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |

| SplitButton | OnClick | `EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| SplitButton | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` |  |
| SplitButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` |  |
| SplitButton | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SplitButton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
